seo.title: How to Use the De-Marker Indicator (DeM) in Trading
seo.description: The DeMarker (DeM) indicator is a leading oscillator that helps traders identify potential market tops, bottoms, and shifts in momentum. This article explains how DeM works, how to interpret its signals, and how to combine it with other tools for more reliable trading decisions.
